rationale: Educ. Code §29.018 governs special education grants and references state funds under §§48.102 and 48.1021, not the homestead exemption. No direct statutory conflict; any impact is indirect via school finance formulas.
quote: the commissioner shall make grants available to school districts to assist districts in covering the cost of educating students with disabilities.
_note: No direct reference to Tax Code §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts in this statute. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue may affect grant demand but does not create a statutory conflict.
